title: corybas insulifloris
intro: Corybas insulifloris is a rare, terrestrial orchid species that is endemic to the Philippines. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional folk medicine to treat various health conditions. The Corybas insulifloris is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, thereby providing health benefits such as relieving cold and flu symptoms. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
